name: Market Boundary Puncture

VINIT.justification: pre-puncture equilibrium; uninitialized valuation lattice before structural mapping

TANCH.justification: Topology.are anchors the closed O_inf system; contains all edge invariants

AFWD.justification: forward morphism along edge invariants (lags) toward target primitives

AREV.justification: reverse descent from terminal nodes back to root valuation lattice

CLINK.justification: sequential composition of cross-domain correlation evaluations

IMSCRIB.justification: market observes its own structural valuation; identity of the graph

FSPLIT.justification: splits the B-state contradiction into classical T (bullish) and F (bearish) streams

FFUSE.justification: fuses T and F streams back to B-state; preserves structural losslessness

EVALT.justification: T-stream resolves positively; bullish structural alignment confirmed

EVALF.justification: F-stream resolves negatively; bearish structural alignment confirmed

ENGAGR.justification: simultaneously holds bullish and bearish valuations without resolution; B-state fixed point

IFIX.justification: permanent append-only record of the puncture event and edge invariant signature

phase_3.void_description: Pre-puncture equilibrium; unvalued market state before adjacency matrix projection
phase_3.true_description: T-stream resolved; affirmative structural alignment (bullish confluence)
phase_3.false_description: F-stream resolved; negative structural alignment (bearish confluence)
phase_3.both_description: B-state paradice; simultaneous bullish-bearish confluence held without resolution

steps.domain_action: Initialize void market state before boundary definition and structural mapping
Anchor the holographic market topology (are) as the closed O_inf system boundary
Traverse forward along edge invariants (structural lags) toward target primitives
Compositionally chain primitive evaluations across independent financial domains
The market manifold reads its own valuation lattice (self-reference)
Bifurcate the dialetheic B-state into classical T and F streams
Affirmative evaluation on the T-stream (bullish confluence)
Negative evaluation on the F-stream (bearish confluence)
Hold both T and F valuations simultaneously without resolution (paradice)
Reconstitute the bifurcated streams back into the original B-state
Permanently record the puncture event and structural alignment in the ledger
Seal the closed system after verification of the Frobenius identity

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Lean 4 paraconsistent kernel (BelnapSplitFuse.lean) translating structural invariants into operations
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Edge invariant routing (lag=constant) across the static adjacency matrix
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Belnap FOUR valuation lattice (N, T, F, B) stored as immutable tensor products
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Topological ordering of the inference graph (trace as structural depth, not time)
phase_5.alfs_store: O_inf tier catalog entry (belnap_four_topology) serving as canonical reference

phase_6.cycle_cost: Computational steps for lattice join/meet and Frobenius round-trip
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Unvalued market state (void) or B-state paradice
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Fixed ledger entry (IFIX) with preserved B-state valuation
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The Frobenius split/fuse cycle is structurally lossless; information is bifurcated and reconstituted without entropy generation

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → AFWD → CLINK → IMSCRIB → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALF → ENGAGR → FFUSE → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: Market Boundary Puncture
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(5, 9)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑾  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑡 → 𐑱  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑾 → 𐑠  | composition — regime coherence
--   [4] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑱 → 𐑚  | identity — self-imscription
--   [5] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [6] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [7] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [8] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [9] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑭  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [10] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑙 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [11] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def market_boundary_puncture_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Initialize void market state before boundary definition and structural mapping)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Anchor the holographic market topology (are) as the closed O_inf system boundary)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑡 𐑱)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Traverse forward along edge invariants (structural lags) toward target primit...)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑾 𐑠)  -- [3] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Compositionally chain primitive evaluations across independent financial domains)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑱 𐑚)  -- [4] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The market manifold reads its own valuation lattice (self-reference))
  -- FSPLIT [5] (gran := 𐑚) (Bifurcate the dialetheic B-state into classical T and F streams) / FFUSE [9] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Affirmative evaluation on the T-stream (bullish confluence))
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Negative evaluation on the F-stream (bearish confluence))
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Hold both T and F valuations simultaneously without resolution (paradice)))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [9]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [9] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstitute the bifurcated streams back into the original B-state)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [10] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanently record the puncture event and structural alignment in the ledger)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [11] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Seal the closed system after verification of the Frobenius identity)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def market_boundary_puncture_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (market_boundary_puncture_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def market_boundary_puncture_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (market_boundary_puncture_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem market_boundary_puncture_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
